detail.description: Endy Rodríguez doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Noelvi Marte.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Luke Raley. Nick Gonzales scores. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd.
Endy Rodríguez doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Nick Gonzales scores. Ryan O'Hearn scores.
Endy Rodríguez doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Endy Rodríguez homers (2) on a line drive to right center field.
Endy Rodríguez doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Konnor Griffin scores. Marcell Ozuna to 2nd.
Endy Rodríguez doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. Ryan O'Hearn scores.
Endy Rodríguez homers (3) on a line drive to left center field.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Konnor Griffin to 3rd.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Konnor Griffin to 2nd.
Endy Rodríguez doubles (2) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Taylor Trammell. Nick Gonzales scores.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was overturned: Endy Rodríguez homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Nick Gonzales scores.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Jhostynxon Garcia to 3rd.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Endy Rodríguez homers (5) on a fly ball to center field.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Nick Gonzales to 3rd.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
